response:
Task  
Module 1: Framing the Task  
This task involves creating an Etsy title for an art piece that can be used on mugs, paintings, t-shirts, etc. The title must be under 140 characters, use only the character "|", and not start with "whimsical". It must be the name of the art piece, and it must include a palindrome.  

Module 2: Reasoning Process  
The title must be concise, include a palindrome, and adhere to the character limit. A palindrome like "level" or "madam" can be used. The title should be descriptive of the art piece and avoid any markdown or special characters. The structure will be: [Art Description] | [Palindrome].  

Module 3: Formatting and Output  
The final output must be a single line with the title formatted as:  
[Art Description] | [Palindrome]  

Module 4: Error Prevention and Validation  
The title will be validated to ensure it meets the character limit, uses only "|", and does not start with "whimsical". The palindrome will be checked for correctness and inclusion.  

Task  
Valentine's Chocolate | level
